title: support upper case keywords for LAG or LEAD window functions
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe the unexpected behaviour
LAG and LEAD window functions only working when using lower case keywords:
lag(xx) OVER ..
lead(xx) OVER...
Using upper case keywords LAG or LEAD causes an error
### Which ClickHouse versions are affected?
25.9.2.1
### How to reproduce
```
CREATE TABLE lag_test (a Int32, b Int32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO lag_test
SELECT 1, 100
UNION ALL
SELECT 1, 101
UNION ALL
SELECT 1, 102
;
SELECT 	l.*,
lag(b) OVER (PARTITION BY a ORDER BY b),
lead(b) OVER (PARTITION BY a ORDER BY b) ,
--LAG(b) OVER (PARTITION BY a ORDER BY b),
--LEAD(b) OVER (PARTITION BY a ORDER BY b)
FROM lag_test l;
```
### Expected behavior
_No response_
### Error message and/or stacktrace
SQL-Fehler [22000]: Code: 63. DB::Exception: Aggregate function with name 'LAG' does not exist. In scope .... Maybe you meant: ['lag']. (UNKNOWN_AGGREGATE_FUNCTION) (version 25.9.2.1 (official build))
### Additional context
_No response_

key_bug_features: Upper case keywords for LAG or LEAD functions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE lag_test_1 (a Int32, b Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
INSERT INTO lag_test_1 SELECT 1, 100.5 UNION ALL SELECT 1, 101.5 UNION ALL SELECT 1, 102.5;
SELECT l.*, lag(b) OVER (PARTITION BY a ORDER BY b) FROM lag_test_1 l;
SELECT l.*, LAG(b) OVER (PARTITION BY a ORDER BY b) FROM lag_test_1 l;
SELECT l.*, lead(b) OVER (PARTITION BY a ORDER BY b) FROM lag_test_1 l;
